characters.name: Ants
characters.description: For Me the Ant seeMe. Ants as seen during the beginning ofFair Shares Antsare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Most of the ants seen marching behind the leader ant have no distinct personality and do not have lines (except the leader). The ants seem to primarily be concerned with finding food. The ants always follow the leader. The leader is shown to be quite sensitive and is saddened when someone doesn't like to share its food with them or when he couldn't find anything to eat. They could be quite pesky, especially toQuack, as he didn't like it when they were eating his bread or marched muddy tracks onto his clean hat.

characters.name: Bats
characters.description: A bat as seen in Peep's Moon Mission Batsare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Bats usually appear yellowish-brown with a pair of large wings and two smaller feet, though they may also appear to be black in the dark. Their bodies are oval-shaped and on the front of their bodies bats have two eyes, a darker brown nose, and a mouth with two teeth appearing out of it at all times. Bats also have oval ears that are darker in the middle. Bats are active at night since they are nocturnal. The personality of the bats depend on the individual. One bat doesn't like his daytime slumber being disturbed byPeep,Chirp, andQuack. He is also shy and likes mysteries. A different one is quite talkative and into sharing things as seen in inPeep's Night Out.
characters.personality_section: Bats are active at night since they are nocturnal. The personality of the bats depend on the individual. A different one is quite talkative and into sharing things as seen in inPeep's Night Out.

characters.name: Beaver Boy
characters.description: Male Beaver 8'0" Beaver Boy is rather slow-witted, naive and dumb, even more so than Quack, although he is also far less selfish. He generally seems willing to try new things, and even tries to be responsible, although due to his ditzy nature, he rarely succeeds in doing so. Whenever he does something for the first time, he will often exclaim 'My first' and then say the name of whatever it is that he has to or will do. He often refers toQuack,Peep, andChirpas "Big Blue Sailor", "Yellow Guy", and "Red Round" respectively. He is kind and well-meaning. He tends to say "and stuff" at the end of his sentences. He also doesn't like when his work is being interrupted and tells the birds to keep back when he is busy.

characters.name: Beaver Mom & Beaver Dad
characters.description: Beaver MomandBeaver Dadare minor characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Quack with Beaver Mom and Beaver Dad She has light brown fur and is larger than Beaver Boy, being his mother. Like other beavers she has two round ears, four short legs with black paws, a nose, and two buckteeth at the front of her mouth. The two parents, in general, are mainly concerned with working and building dams.

characters.name: Bees
characters.description: In abeehive Beesare a species inPeep and the Big Wide World. Bees are depicted as have the body shape of an elongated sphere and have a pair of wings, round eyes under antennae, and a brown stinger. Their bodies has black stripes and bees also have six legs, though at any given angle only two to four are shown. Bees also appear to have a brown circular nose. Bees sting whom they don't like, though this action seems to be reserved, and they dislike the word "beeswax".
characters.personality_section: Bees sting whom they don't like, though this action seems to be reserved, and they dislike the word "beeswax".

characters.name: Birds
characters.description: A red bird in the gameRound and Round Birdsare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Birds are shown to be covered with feathers. The colors of the feathers vary on what type of bird they are. Birds obviously have wings and beaks. They have two black feet below. Usually, birds with speaking roles are shown to have different attitudes. Some are helpful and smart, while some like the Bluejays are shown not to be cautious. Sometimes, they could get pretty annoying. Other birds that just tweet are shown to be very passive.
characters.personality_section: Usually, birds with speaking roles are shown to have different attitudes. Some are helpful and smart, while some like the Bluejays are shown not to be cautious. Sometimes, they could get pretty annoying. Other birds that just tweet are shown to be very passive.

characters.name: Rabbits
characters.description: For the orange rabbit seeOrange Rabbit, and for the rabbits fromPeep in RabbitlandseeRabbits (Peep in Rabbitland). Rabbitsare a species inPeep and the Big Wide World. A rabbit as seen inFlower Shower Rabbits don't talk much but, likefrogs, are often seen hopping. They usually traverse in groups.

characters.name: Butterflies
characters.description: A butterfly as seen inHide and Go Peep For the caterpillar who turns into a butterfly inPeep's New FriendseeCaterpillar. Butterfliesare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Throughout most of the series, butterflies are shown to be silent and tend to only fly around. They act very passive. Some butterflies however have been shown talking like the one Peep met after being a caterpillar and the one playing hide and seek with Peep and Chirp.

characters.description: Hide and Go Peep Chameleonis a character that appears in the episodeHide and Go Peep. Chameleon has four legs, a long tail and two circular white eyes with black pupils. When Chameleon is hiding, his color is the same as what he is on or what he is with.

characters.name: Chipmunks
characters.description: Chipmunksare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Chipmunks are mostly orange. They have brown noses with black going from the top of it, through the middle of their faces, their backs to their tails. They also have black hands and feet and two white circular eyes with black pupils. Chipmunks are shown to be quite playful, but are not destructive. One chipmunk is shown to have poor table manners though, as he is seen eating an apple rapidly in Smaller Than a Peep. Chipmunks are shown to be quite playful, but are not destructive. One chipmunk is shown to have poor table manners though, as he is seen eating an apple rapidly in Smaller Than a Peep.

characters.media_title: Peep and the Big Wide World

characters.name: Chirp
characters.description: —Chirp Robin 3'0" Just likePeep, Chirp is often very kind, sweet, honest, accommodating, witty, polite, and friendly, as well as, at times, curious and naive. Unlike Peep, however, she is mean, sassy, short-tempered, tomboyish, spoiled, and bossy (mostly with Quack). She is shown not to be very fond of theBlue Jays, as they always cause trouble. Chirp likes to collecting and sorting things and tries very hard to fly which, despite her effort, does not take her very far from the ground. She admires adult birds and tries to imitate them, and hates getting wet, possibly due to contact from water distorting her feathers. She is often shown as smarter and more knowledgeable thanPeeporQuackas, in the episodeThe Real Decoy, she knew that theduck statuewas a statue while Peep and Quack thought it was real. She is also down-to-earth.

characters.name: Churp
characters.description: ChurpSo male robins are born egg-shaped and are born smaller than female robins and- wait, what?GenderMale (presumably)SpeciesRobinVoice ActorUnknownHomeA robin's nest Note: It is not exactly stated that the name of the following character is true, but the character itself is canon so it stays. Churp with a u is a minor character in the Peep and the Big Wide World series. He only appears inQuack Hatches an Egg. Absolutely adorable and a bit simple-minded.

characters.name: Crab
characters.description: Crab inDry Duck Part 2 Crabis a minor character inPeep and the Big Wide World. Crab is mostly purple, has two claws, a shell, and feet underneath. Crab is shown to be nice, and never makes any mistakes throughout the series. He is shown not to have a major speaking role throughout the whole series.

characters.name: Crows
characters.description: Crowsare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. Crows are covered in dark purple feathers and have two wings on each side of their bodies. Their beaks are gray or purple and they have yellow eyes. Most crows have tufts of hair on their heads in a similar fashion toChirp. Crows also have passerine feet with three toes in the front and one toe in the back. Unlike most characters, crows's outlines are light purple instead of black. Crows are portrayed as liking shiny things and being slightly eccentric. Crows are portrayed as liking shiny things and being slightly eccentric.
characters.personality_section: Crows are portrayed as liking shiny things and being slightly eccentric.

characters.name: Female Quack
characters.description: Female Duck Quack Quack Female Quack is often characterized as smug, hilarious, pompous, impudent, bossy, snobbish, annoying, obnoxious and even more self-centered than Quack is. During the two episodes she is in, she takes overQuack's pond, his name, and his friends, but later returns them. According to many other characters, she has a very good singing voice, and performed a concert about ducks in Quack's Pond with all of his friends. She even gives Quack a new name, Plurp. Female Quack acts kind, generous and nice when Quack,Beaver Boy, andhis parentssurprise her with a new pond away from Quack's. Since then, she has never reappeared in the show.
characters.personality_section: Female Quack is often characterized as smug, hilarious, pompous, impudent, bossy, snobbish, annoying, obnoxious and even more self-centered than Quack is. According to many other characters, she has a very good singing voice, and performed a concert about ducks in Quack's Pond with all of his friends. She even gives Quack a new name, Plurp. Female Quack acts kind, generous and nice when Quack,Beaver Boy, andhis parentssurprise her with a new pond away from Quack's. Since then, she has never reappeared in the show.
characters.media_title: Peep and the Big Wide World

characters.name: Female Quack
characters.description: Female Duck Quack Quack Female Quack is often characterized as smug, hilarious, pompous, impudent, bossy, snobbish, annoying, obnoxious and even more self-centered than Quack is. During the two episodes she is in, she takes overQuack's pond, his name, and his friends, but later returns them. According to many other characters, she has a very good singing voice, and performed a concert about ducks in Quack's Pond with all of his friends. She even gives Quack a new name, Plurp. Female Quack acts kind, generous and nice when Quack,Beaver Boy, andhis parentssurprise her with a new pond away from Quack's. Since then, she has never reappeared in the show.
characters.personality_section: Female Quack is often characterized as smug, hilarious, pompous, impudent, bossy, snobbish, annoying, obnoxious and even more self-centered than Quack is. During the two episodes she is in, she takes overQuack's pond, his name, and his friends, but later returns them. According to many other characters, she has a very good singing voice, and performed a concert about ducks in Quack's Pond with all of his friends. She even gives Quack a new name, Plurp. Female Quack acts kind, generous and nice when Quack,Beaver Boy, andhis parentssurprise her with a new pond away from Quack's. Since then, she has never reappeared in the show.
characters.media_title: Peep and the Big Wide World

characters.name: Fireflies
characters.description: Fireflies as seen in the title card ofPeep's Night Out Firefliesare minor characters and a species inPeep and the Big Wide World. Fireflies seen in the show are depicted as having a gray head and thorax, and a glowing abdomen that gives off small amounts of light. They also have a pair of wings and two antennae. They are much smaller thanPeep. Fireflies are passive and only tend to fly around while shining their lights at night. They never had any speaking roles. However, one firefly doesn't isn't very smart and flew right into Quack's mouth while he was sleeping, causing him to choke until it came out.

characters.name: Fish
characters.description: FishGenderMales and FemalesSpeciesFishVoice ActorJohn McGrath(orange fish)Phoebe McAuley(Fish Jr.)HomeQuack's pondFishare a species inPeep and the Big Wide World. Fish usually have a tail, two fins on the side, and one dorsal fin. These fins have black lines and are darker colors that the rest of the body. Most have the same appearance, only they are colored differently. The fish appear to be mostly concerned with the world above Quack's pond. They are friends withQuackeven though he bosses them around most of the time. The orange fish however is shown to be strict and wise. It is shown when he didn't likeFish Jr.telling Quack she wants to go up with him since they can't leave the water. The fish appear to be mostly concerned with the world above Quack's pond. They are friends withQuackeven though he bosses them around most of the time. The orange fish however is shown to be strict and wise. It is shown when he didn't likeFish Jr.telling Quack she wants to go up with him since they can't leave the water.

characters.name: Fish Jr.
characters.description: Female[1] Fish 2'8" Fish Jr. is friendly and curious and also willing to try new things. Her personality is somewhat similar toPeep. She doesn't know a lot of things, such as how fish cannot leave the water. Her grammar is not so great as she once said, "What's a balloons?".

characters.media_title: Peep and the Big Wide World

characters.name: Flies
characters.description: A fly Fliesare a species of characters inPeep and the Big Wide World. They appeared inNosing Around. Flies are colored black. They have two eyes with black pupils, and wings. They have six legs and feet. Flies are shown to be pesky. They are attracted to anybody and anything that is smelly. They don't have any speaking role though, as they've only appeared inNosing Around.
characters.personality_section: Flies are shown to be pesky. They are attracted to anybody and anything that is smelly. They don't have any speaking role though, as they've only appeared inNosing Around.

characters.media_title: Peep and the Big Wide World

characters.name: Frog
characters.description: Frogis a major character inPeep and the Big Wide World. Frog is depicted as sitting upright and having four three-toed legs with two small legs placed at the bottom in the middle of his body and two larger legs jutting out from his sides. His head is flat and curves at one end to form a dull point with the line used to indicate the outline of the Frog's head curving onto its face to form a smile. On top and in the middle of the Frog's head, placed close together, is the Frog's eyes that are oval shaped and cartoon-like with black circular pupils. Lastly, the Frog's entire body, save for its eyes, are green and surrounded by a black outline. Frog is shown speaking little and mostly reduced to saying "ribbit" or "hop" when jumping; however, in the episodeSounds Like...he is heard saying multiple sentences and speaking in a deep voice and inHide and Go Peep, he is heard saying "I don't know about that." Despite that, Frog can be shown to have short temper and hates being touched or woken up (notably byQuack). He can be shown to be bored a lot of times and bothered by Quack. In one episode, he annoyed Quack with his repeated "ribbit". Frog is often always present near bodies of water and often seen sitting on lily pads.
